_comment: Desecrated-mod fixture regenerated from poe2db.tw 0.5 'Return of the Ancients' data (global Desecrated Mods /196 page + per-class modsview desecrated sections, cached under /tmp/poc2_audit, fetched 2026-06). Equipment mods are all ilvl 65, named Amanamu's/Kurgal's/Ulaman's (prefixes) and of Amanamu/of Kurgal/of Ulaman (suffixes); armour classes (BodyArmour/Helmet/Gloves/Boots/Shield/Buckler) are suffix-only. Jewels carry the separate 'Lightless' pool at ilvl 1 (no lord; regular jewels = prefixes, Time-Lost radius mods = suffixes). Each entry is one distinct (name, stat text, affix) with classes merged across pages; kind = Desecrated, flags |= DESECRATED_ONLY. 'destruction' sections (Thrud's Might) are a different 0.5 mechanic and are deliberately NOT in this fixture. Regen script: /tmp/poc2_audit/gen_desecrated.py.

_schema.id: stable engine ModId (PascalCase: Desecrated + lord + family stem)
_schema.name: poe2db affix name (Amanamu's / of Kurgal / Lightless / ...)
_schema.lord: Amanamu | Kurgal | Ulaman; absent for the jewel Lightless pool
_schema.classes: list of ItemClassId strings the mod can spawn on
_schema.tier: always 1 — the 0.5 pool has no tier ladders
_schema.text: cleaned mod text with (min-max) ranges, for display
_schema.stats: list of {stat_id, min, max}; one per (x-y) range
